# Collected External Resources

Source: Links collected in the project conversation.
Provided by: H3VR Modding Contributor
Captured: 2026-07-10
Redistribution: link index only; no third-party full text copied.

## Primary H3VR sources

- H3VR Modding Wiki: https://h3vr-modding.github.io/wiki/
- H3VR Modding Wiki source: https://github.com/H3VR-Modding/wiki
- MeatKit source: https://github.com/H3VR-Modding/MeatKit
- Mason source: https://github.com/H3VR-Modding/Mason
- Stratum source: https://github.com/H3VR-Modding/Stratum
- WurstMod source: https://github.com/Nolenz/WurstMod
- Atlas sample scenes: https://github.com/H3VR-Modding/AtlasSampleScenes
- OtherLoader source: https://github.com/devyndamonster/OtherLoader
- GunGame source: https://github.com/KacperObara/H3VR-GunGame
- GunGame map wiki source: https://github.com/KacperObara/H3VR-GunGame.wiki

## Map, rendering, and debugging

- SteamVR frame timing: https://developer.valvesoftware.com/wiki/SteamVR/Frame_Timing
- Unity CullingGroup article: https://blogs.unity3d.com/2016/12/20/unitytips-cullinggroups-api/
- Unity reflection probes: https://docs.unity3d.com/Manual/AdvancedRefProbe.html
- Unity 5.5 scripting reference: https://docs.unity3d.com/550/Documentation/ScriptReference/
- BepInEx documentation: https://bepinex.github.io/bepinex_docs/
- Alloy: https://github.com/Josh015/Alloy
- RuntimeUnityEditor: https://github.com/ManlyMarco/RuntimeUnityEditor
- Garret Polk H3VR material: https://bitbucket.org/GarretPolk/h3vr/
- CG Cookie lighting material: https://cgcookie.com/articles/art-of-lighting-in-blender

## Notes about incomplete links

The project conversation also included truncated Google Docs, Asset Store, Discord,
ManlyMarco, and Unity blog URLs. Their supplied text is preserved in the
user-provided notes where available. A direct source card is added only when a
complete URL or a verified upstream repository is known.
